import React from 'react'; import { Link } from 'react-router-dom'; import { TrendingUp, Brain, Shield, Zap, BarChart3, MessageCircle, Users, Award, ArrowRight, CheckCircle } from 'lucide-react'; /** * Landing Page Component * Professional homepage introducing the AI-Powered Crypto Analytics platform */ const LandingPage: React.FC = () => { const features = [ { icon: , title: "AI-Powered Predictions", description: "Advanced LSTM, ARIMA, and Transformer models for accurate price forecasting" }, { icon: , title: "Technical Analysis", description: "Real-time RSI, MACD, Bollinger Bands, and custom trading indicators" }, { icon: , title: "24/7 AI Chatbot", description: "Get instant answers about crypto markets and your portfolio performance" }, { icon: , title: "Risk Assessment", description: "Comprehensive portfolio risk analysis and protection strategies" }, { icon: , title: "Real-time Data", description: "Live market data, price alerts, and instant trading signals" }, { icon: , title: "Portfolio Tracking", description: "Connect exchanges, track performance, and optimize your investments" } ]; const stats = [ { number: "99.2%", label: "Prediction Accuracy" }, { number: "50K+", label: "Active Users" }, { number: "15+", label: "Supported Exchanges" }, { number: "24/7", label: "Market Monitoring" } ]; return (

Everything you need to analyze, predict, and optimize your cryptocurrency investments

{feature.icon}

{feature.title}

))}

How It Works

Get started in just 3 simple steps

1

Connect Your Portfolio

Link your exchange accounts or manually add your holdings to start tracking

2

AI Analysis

Our AI models analyze market data and generate personalized insights for your portfolio

3

Make Informed Decisions

Get real-time predictions, risk assessments, and trading recommendations

Ready to Supercharge Your Crypto Trading?

Join thousands of traders who are already using AI to maximize their returns

); }; export default LandingPage;
